differential_diagnoses: Neurodegenerative disease with rapid progression (e.g., Alzheimer's disease)
Primary angiitis of the central nervous system (PACNS)
next_steps: Send cerebrospinal fluid for autoimmune encephalitis antibody panel
Send serum for paraneoplastic and autoimmune encephalitis panels
Perform whole-body PET-CT or repeat CT of chest/abdomen/pelvis for malignancy screening
Monitor for seizure progression and optimize antiepileptic therapy
Consult neurology, neuro-oncology, and rheumatology for multidisciplinary management
